title: atuna scabra
intro: Atuna scabra, also known as the forest mahogany or forest tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Atuna scabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Atuna scabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of Asia.
